name: Bachelor's Buttons
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in eggs; add vanilla.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; stir into creamed mixture.
4. Mix thoroughly.
5. Drop by teaspoons onto greased baking sheet.
6. Put half a cherry on top of each "button".
7. Bake 8-10 minutes at 425°F.
